definition: Informal employment rate at province-year level
notes: Aggregate outcome; do not interpret as individual-worker-level effect.

definition: Log of CPI-adjusted regional minimum wage
notes: Preferred treatment for main reporting because it reduces scale issues.

definition: CPI-adjusted regional minimum wage with 2018 CPI base
notes: Use as robustness treatment in level wage scale.

definition: Growth rate of real minimum wage by wage region over time
notes: Do not present as main treatment because DML theta is unstable and TWFE evidence is weak.

definition: Nominal regional minimum wage before CPI adjustment
notes: Use for policy context and treatment construction only.

definition: Share/rate of trained labour at province-year level

notes: Use only as robustness alternative to log_employed_persons; do not include both together.
